itemReviewed.name: Government Model Sanskriti Senior Secondary School - Sector 43

address.streetAddress: F34P+Q8G, Vyapar Kendra Rd, Block C, DLF Garden Villas, Sector 43, Gurugram, Haryana 122002, India

itemListElement.reviewBody: If anyone is planning to take admission in this school by reading the fancy information that is given on the site of this school, lemme tell you one thing ( as I'm an alumnus of this school ) that there is not something like physics, chemistry or biology labs in this school. They've only kept these labs to make their school presentable to the higher authority officials who come for inspection and also at the time when viva is on the verge. Moreover, lot of teachers in this school don't even know how to teach despite having masters & PhD degrees except some like Biology educator Monika ma'am, English educator Laxmi ma'am, Music educator Shakuntala ma'am, etc . Furthermore, you would have to fulfill the 75 percent attendance criteria otherwise the teachers would call you parents everyday and would question your existence for this. Some teachers also become your enemies just because you don't follow their lectures or notes. Also, 1) they don't have water coolers, 2) the classrooms are full of love birds, 3) strict rules and regulations on the paper but while having those rules get practiced, the teachers are reckless, 4) the teachers are not approachable at all (except some), 5) teachers not take their lectures on time. I think these things would've convinced you guys to not take admission in this school. I wish I found a review like this before taking admission in this school rather than those fancy reviews.
